ANURAG MOHANTY

Mountain Lakes, NJ, 201-970-0928 / anurag.mohanty@gmail.com

linkedin.com/in/anuragmohanty1/    

AM

AMANURAG MOHANTY	

Mountain Lakes, NJ 07046 ◼ 201-970-0928 ◼ anurag.mohanty@gmail.com◼ linkedin.com/in/anuragmohanty1/    





Results-driven product leader with 15+ years of experience in AI-driven product strategy, digital transformation, and enterprise SaaS development. Expertise in scaling high-impact products, optimizing operational efficiency, and leading cross-functional teams. Passionate about building customer-centric solutions that drive revenue growth and streamline complex workflows.

Selected Achievements

Enterprise Digital Transformation: Led a $1B modernization initiative at Cigna, optimizing claims adjudication workflows and increasing efficiency by 25% while ensuring regulatory compliance and scalability.

AI & Customer Experience: Spearheaded AI-driven automation at Blink Health, reducing manual interventions by 30%, accelerating provider-patient interactions, and improving customer satisfaction (NPS +15 points).

Omnichannel Retail & Logistics Optimization: Built and scaled a real-time logistics optimization platform at Wayfair, reducing delivery costs by 15%, improving fleet efficiency, and enhancing customer fulfillment speed.

Marketplace & Revenue Growth: Developed and launched a two-sided Digital Health Formulary (DHF) marketplace, increasing client adoption by 20%, unlocking new revenue opportunities, and expanding strategic partnerships.

Leadership & Cross-Functional Execution: Built and scaled high-performing product teams, mentoring 12+ PMs, with 70% advancing to leadership roles, fostering a culture of ownership & innovation.

Professional Experience

Blink Health | Principal Product Manager | Aug 2023 – Present

Optimized doctor and payer engagement strategies, contributing to a 30% reduction in operational costs and elevating customer satisfaction scores through personalized, data-driven solutions.

Drove regulatory compliance & security improvements, ensuring platform alignment with privacy laws and optimizing digital trust and security for customer data.

Wayfair | Principal Product Manager | Mar 2022 – Mar 2023

Led the successful launch of SaaS-based driver management products across international markets, ensuring regional compliance and scaling solutions for global ecosystems.

Directed the modernization of last-mile delivery systems, improving routing efficiency and cutting delivery costs by 15%, while enhancing customer satisfaction through faster, more reliable delivery.

Cigna | Director & Group Product Manager | Jan 2011 – Mar 2022

Orchestrated specialty pricing & reimbursement strategies, optimizing payer-provider dynamics and reducing manual adjudications by 30%.

Led multi-year post-merger technology integrations, increasing scalability, streamlining operations, and generating $2M in annual cost efficiencies.

Designed and launched a scalable State Mandate Platform, automating policy updates and reducing manual compliance efforts by 30%.

Spearheaded cloud transformation of claims infrastructure, ensuring CMS compliance, fortifying security, and accelerating service response times.

Directed large-scale platform modernization initiatives, enhancing interoperability, regulatory adherence, and enterprise-wide digital transformation.

Walmart | Sr. Manager at Walmart | May 2007 – Dec 2010

Led the implementation of voice-based order-filling technology, reducing processing times and improving accuracy



EDUCATION

Master of Business Administration, Xavier Institute of Management, Bhubaneswar, India 

Bachelor of Technology, National Institute of Technology, Rourkela, India

Data Science Certificate, Stanford University, January 2023

SKILLS and PROFICIENCIES

AI & Data Strategy: Machine Learning Applications, Workflow Automation, Intelligent Decisioning

SaaS & Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, API-Based System Integrations

Product Development: Agile Methodologies, B2B/B2C Innovation, Digital Transformation

Leadership & Execution: Stakeholder Management, Team Growth, Cross-Functional Collaboration

Dynamic product executive with 15+ years of success driving transformative healthcare technology and
enterprise digital strategies. Expert in forging strategic partnerships, deploying cutting-edge AI solutions, and
optimizing operational efficiencies to accelerate growth. Track record of launching high-impact products and
delivering innovative solutions that consistently exceed business objectives. Adept at scaling and leading teams,
fostering a culture of excellence, and seamlessly transitioning between high-level strategy and hands-on
execution to drive measurable impact.
SELECTED ACHIEVEMENTS
• Strategic Healthcare Partnerships: Developed and executed strategic partnerships at Blink Health,
collaborating with payers, providers, and pharmacies, driving a 20% growth in adoption and new revenue
streams.
• Enterprise Digital Transformation: Led a $1B modernization initiative at Cigna, optimizing claims
adjudication workflows and increasing efficiency by 25% while ensuring regulatory compliance and
scalability.
• AI & Customer Experience: Spearheaded AI-driven automation at Blink Health, reducing manual
interventions by 30%, accelerating provider-patient interactions, and improving customer satisfaction
(NPS +15 points).
• Omnichannel Retail & Logistics Optimization: Built and scaled a real-time logistics optimization platform
at Wayfair, reducing delivery costs by 15%, improving fleet efficiency, and enhancing customer
fulfillment speed.
• Marketplace & Revenue Growth: Developed and launched a two-sided Digital Health Formulary (DHF)
marketplace, increasing client adoption by 20%, unlocking new revenue opportunities, and expanding
strategic partnerships.
• Leadership & Cross-Functional Execution: Built and scaled high-performing product teams, mentoring
12+ PMs, with 70% advancing to leadership roles, fostering a culture of ownership & innovation.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Blink Health | Principal Product Manager | Aug 2023 – Present
• Optimized doctor and payer engagement strategies, contributing to a 30% reduction in operational costs
and elevating customer satisfaction scores through personalized, data-driven solutions.
• Drove regulatory compliance & security improvements, ensuring platform alignment with privacy laws
and optimizing digital trust and security for customer data.
Wayfair | Principal Product Manager | Mar 2022 – Mar 2023
• Led the successful launch of SaaS-based driver management products across international markets,
ensuring regional compliance and scaling solutions for global ecosystems.
• Directed the modernization of last-mile delivery systems, improving routing efficiency and cutting
delivery costs by 15%, while enhancing customer satisfaction through faster, more reliable delivery.
Cigna | Director & Group Product Manager | Jan 2011 – Mar 2022
• Orchestrated specialty pricing & reimbursement strategies, optimizing payer-provider dynamics and
reducing manual adjudications by 30%.
• Led multi-year post-merger technology integrations, increasing scalability, streamlining operations, and
generating $2M in annual cost efficiencies.
• Designed and launched a scalable State Mandate Platform, automating policy updates and reducing
manual compliance efforts by 30%.
• Spearheaded cloud transformation of claims infrastructure, ensuring CMS compliance, fortifying
security, and accelerating service response times.
• Directed large-scale platform modernization initiatives, enhancing interoperability, regulatory
adherence, and enterprise-wide digital transformation.
Walmart | Sr. Manager at Walmart | May 2007 – Dec 2010
• Led the implementation of voice-based order-filling technology, reducing processing times and
improving accuracy
EDUCATION
• Master of Business Administration, Xavier Institute of Management, Bhubaneswar, India
• Bachelor of Technology, National Institute of Technology, Rourkela, India
• Data Science Certificate, Stanford University
SKILLS and PROFICIENCIES
• Strategic Partnerships & Alliances: Negotiation, Stakeholder Alignment, Market Expansion
• AI & Automation Integration: Machine Learning, Workflow Optimization, Intelligent Automation
• Product Lifecycle Management: Product Roadmapping, Agile Methodologies, End-to-End Delivery
• Healthcare Technology Innovation: Digital Health Solutions, Regulatory Adherence, User-Centric Design
• Agile & Lean Product Development: Scrum, Iterative Development, Continuous Improvement
• Cross-Functional Team Leadership: Team Building, Collaborative Execution, Talent Development
• Regulatory & Compliance Expertise: CMS, NCPDP, HIPAA Compliance, Risk Management, Quality
